creator: comet@transbay.net
text:
The /usr/bin/calendar program reports that Chuck Berry was born in San Jose California but he was not born in California.

Chuck Berry was born in St. Louis, Missouri in 1926 on October 18.

  http://www.chuckberry.com/about/bio.htm

  http://www.khaldea.com/charts/chuckberry.shtml

  http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Chuck_Berry

Fix: 

he calendar.music file incorrectly states that he was born in San Jose:

  10/18   Chuck Berry is born in San Jose, California, 1926

It actually should say something like this:

  10/18   Chuck Berry is born in St. Louis, Missouri, 1926
How-To-Repeat: /usr/bin/calendar -t18.10
